short_summary: Iran deal limbo, Tren de Aragua strike
rationale: The US-Iran deal remains the dominant story with direct policy and oil market implications; the confirmed killing of the Tren de Aragua gang leader by US airstrike is a new domestic security/foreign policy action worth noting.

top_events.title: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed Sunday; Tehran casts doubt; Israel strikes Beirut same day
top_events.summary: The Iran deal remains unresolved with conflicting signals from Washington and Tehran, while Israeli strikes on Beirut on the same day complicate the diplomatic picture and keep oil markets on edge for US consumers.

top_events.title: US kills leader of Venezuela's Tren de Aragua gang in air strike
top_events.summary: The Trump administration confirms a US airstrike killed the Tren de Aragua gang leader — a new direct military action with domestic political resonance around immigration and security, though limited daily impact for most Americans.

top_events.title: US asks Anthropic to block global access to top AI models
top_events.summary: The US government's active restriction of Anthropic AI model access abroad continues as federal policy; limited direct daily impact for most Americans but signals ongoing AI security posture.
